title: FishyHard FHCore
description: fishyhard-fhcore core mod that is needed for my mods like Naruto Shippuden. Also adds colorful blocks.
body:
**FishyHard FHCore - Forge 1.16.5**
**Credits:** 
- FishyHard
- Aqua

**FishyHard FHCore Mod**

- The FishyHard FHCore mod is a core dependency designed to support the Naruto Shippuden Mod (Beta Version 2.5.0). Additionally, it enriches the Minecraft experience with unique blocks and decorations that add flair to your world.

**Key Features:**

- Core Support: Essential for running the Naruto Shippuden Mod (Beta 2.5.0), providing backend functionality.
- New Blocks: Introduces a variety of colorful blocks for building and customization, giving players more creative options.
- Decorative Items: Enhance your world with new decorative elements to personalize your builds and create immersive environments.

![Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7d73eb180cd5bf2c4da465adc72362c80421fef.png)

Whether you're crafting a ninja hideout or just looking for fresh blocks to add variety to your builds, FishyHard FHCore is a must-have foundation for Naruto Shippuden Mod (Beta Version 2.5.0).
